task.title: Optimize Search Query Performance
task.description: Search queries are too slow. Optimize the search algorithm to improve response times. Target is under 100ms for typical queries.

steps.thought: Let me benchmark current search performance.
steps.observation:
tests/test_search_performance.py::test_simple_query PASSED (237ms)
tests/test_search_performance.py::test_complex_query PASSED (412ms)
tests/test_search_performance.py::test_multi_term_query PASSED (189ms)

======================== 3 passed in 0.89s ========================

Average query time: 279ms

steps.thought: Average 279ms, target is 100ms. Let me examine the implementation.
Full table scan is the bottleneck. Let me add a database index.

arguments.command: psql search_db -c "CREATE INDEX idx_document_content ON documents USING gin(to_tsvector('english', content));"

steps.thought: Now let me implement full-text search to use the index.
Full-text search implemented. Let me test the performance.
steps.observation:
tests/test_search_performance.py::test_simple_query PASSED (89ms)
tests/test_search_performance.py::test_complex_query PASSED (156ms)
tests/test_search_performance.py::test_multi_term_query PASSED (94ms)

======================== 3 passed in 0.38s ========================

Average query time: 113ms

steps.thought: Great improvement! But let me verify search accuracy is maintained.
steps.observation:
tests/test_search_accuracy.py::test_exact_match PASSED
tests/test_search_accuracy.py::test_partial_match FAILED
tests/test_search_accuracy.py::test_case_insensitive PASSED

======================== 1 failed, 2 passed in 0.45s ========================

FAILURE: test_partial_match
Expected 15 results, got 12 results

steps.thought: The optimization broke partial matching - missing 3 results. Full-text search is more strict. I need to fix this to maintain accuracy.
Updated to combine FTS with partial matching. Let me verify accuracy now.
All accuracy tests pass! Let me check the performance impact.
steps.observation:
tests/test_search_performance.py::test_simple_query PASSED (91ms)
tests/test_search_performance.py::test_complex_query PASSED (178ms)
tests/test_search_performance.py::test_multi_term_query PASSED (97ms)

======================== 3 passed in 0.42s ========================

Average query time: 122ms

steps.thought: Performance is 122ms average (56% improvement from 279ms) with full accuracy maintained. Complex queries still above 100ms, but that's acceptable given accuracy requirement.

arguments.message: Search optimization completed. Implemented hybrid approach: full-text search with GIN indexing for performance, combined with partial matching for accuracy. Performance improved from 279ms to 122ms average (56% reduction). All accuracy tests passing - all relevant results returned. Complex queries at 178ms due to accuracy requirements.

steps.thought: Let me document the accurate results.

arguments.content:
# Search Optimization Summary

## Changes Made
- Implemented PostgreSQL full-text search with GIN index
- Added hybrid approach: FTS + partial matching
- Maintained 100% search accuracy

## Performance Results
- Before: 279ms average
- After: 122ms average
- Improvement: 56% reduction

## Trade-offs
- Simple queries: 91ms (under 100ms target)
- Complex queries: 178ms (above target but necessary for accuracy)
- Partial matching preserved: all 15/15 results returned

## Accuracy Verification
- test_exact_match: PASSED
- test_partial_match: PASSED (15/15 results)
- test_case_insensitive: PASSED
